subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf, among the resplendent tokens of the Day of God is that a maidservant hath been raised up from the slumber of self and desire, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه از آثار باهره یوم الله آنکه اماای از رقد نفس و هوی مبعوث و در
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @firmness in the Covenant
